overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a walk through a sunlit Asian-inspired market alley adorned with red lanterns and neon signage, transitioning through a dark service corridor into industrial back alleys, concluding at a yellow sports car with opening gull-wing doors.

scene_state.functional_zone: Asian market alley with food stalls and neon signage

events.description: character in red helmet stops, turns to face camera, then steps aside to the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow market alley, passing various stalls and vending machines

notable_agents.action: walking ahead, then stopping to turn and gesture before stepping aside to let camera pass

entered.detail: traditional red paper lanterns hanging overhead between buildings
green painted corrugated metal fence and gate structure
food stall with white counter and display items
blue illuminated vending machine with product display
elevated walkway connecting buildings across the alley
pink neon sign with Japanese characters

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow sunlit market alley lined with Asian-inspired architecture and red paper lanterns. A character in a red helmet walks ahead, stops to gesture, then steps aside. The path is flanked by food stalls, vending machines, and neon signs under a partial canopy of overhead structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered service walkway with plastic curtain dividers

events.description: entering dark covered walkway from the sunlit market alley, passing through plastic strip curtains

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit covered passage with plastic curtains on the left side

entered.detail: translucent plastic strip curtains hanging vertically
chain link fencing with plastic sheeting attached
solid concrete ceiling and roof of the covered walkway
brown van covered with tarp visible at the walkway exit

segments.scene_description: Transitioning from the bright market into a dark, enclosed service walkway with plastic strip curtains and metal fencing. The space is dimly lit with a brown van visible at the far end where the passage opens up.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban back lot with parked van and industrial service area

events.description: exiting the dark covered walkway into a sunlit back lot with a parked van and trash bags
approaching a large industrial structure emitting steam with two pedestrians nearby

agents.ego_description: walking through the back lot past a parked van and trash piles, then continuing through an industrial alley

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians walking toward the camera near the industrial steam structure

entered.detail: large piles of white and blue trash bags
tall palm trees visible against the sky
multi-story modern building with glass facade
large industrial unit with pipes emitting white steam
bright yellow sports car with black accents parked on the right

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway into a bright back lot containing a tarp-covered van and piles of trash bags. The camera continues through an industrial service area with a large steam-emitting structure, passing two pedestrians before approaching a yellow sports car.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley with parked yellow sports car

events.description: yellow sports car's gull-wing doors begin to open upward as camera approaches

agents.ego_description: approaching the yellow sports car as its doors automatically open upward

entered.detail: illuminated sign reading 'Wash Run' with blue and orange lighting

segments.scene_description: Approaching a bright yellow sports car parked in the narrow alley. The car's gull-wing doors automatically open upward as the camera moves closer, revealing the red interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a vibrant, sunlit market alley into a gritty industrial back lot. It begins by moving through a narrow passage lined with Asian-inspired architecture and red paper lanterns, following a character in a red helmet who gestures and steps aside amidst food stalls and neon signs. As the camera leaves the bright market, the environment shifts abruptly into a dark, enclosed service walkway characterized by plastic strip curtains and metal fencing. The scene then opens up into a bright industrial lot filled with trash bags and a steam-emitting structure, passing pedestrians before turning toward a parked vehicle. Finally, the camera approaches a bright yellow sports car as its gull-wing doors automatically swing upward to reveal a red interior.
